profile.title: Profile
profile.personalDetailsDesc: Manage your personal information, contact details, and preferences in your profile.
profile.photoTooLarge: Image is larger than required (3MB max).
profile.photoUploadFailedMessage: We couldn't complete your update. Please try again.
profile.photoUploadTimedOutMessage: The upload timed out. Please try again later.
profile.photoUploadNetworkIssueMessage: Unable to upload due to a network issue. Please try again.
profile.photoDeleteFailedMessage: Unable to delete your photo right now. Please try again later.
profile.passwordDesc: Make your account secure by choosing a strong password.
profile.passwordHint: Password must be atleast 6 characters and include an uppercase letter, number, or special character.
profile.socialPasswordDescription: Your account is currently accessed via social login. Set a password to enable sign in using your email and password.
profile.forgotPasswordCheckEmailDescription: A password reset link has been sent to your email. If you don't see it in a few minutes, check your spam folder.
profile.forgotPasswordRequestFailedTitle: We couldn't send the reset email
profile.forgotPasswordRequestFailed: Unable to send a reset link right now. Please try again in a moment.
profile.settingsDesc: Manage your account preferences, including promo alerts, discount notifications, and review settings.
profile.promotionsDesc: Receive updates on discounts, new products, promotions, and special offers.
profile.reviewsDesc: Get email updates everytime your order gets completed as well as published reviews.
profile.confirmationsDesc: Receive notifications for final proof, design edits, and payment proof.
profile.unitDesc: Choose your preferred/default unit of measurement
profile.socialLoginLinked: This account is linked to your {provider} login.

emailChange.title: Email Change
emailChange.description: Enter your new email address and press the "[b]Confirm[/b]" button to proceed.
emailChange.placeholder: Please enter your new email address.
emailChange.enterNewEmail: Please enter your new email address.
emailChange.verifyingDescription: Almost there! We're making sure everything is just right.

emailChangeVerification.title: Verification Required
emailChangeVerification.messagePrefix: We’ll send a verification code to your email to ensure your security. The code will expire in 5 minutes.
emailChangeVerification.enterCode: Please enter the verification code sent to your email.
emailChangeVerification.resendPrefix: Didn't get the code? Check your spam folder or
emailChangeVerification.resendCooldown: Please wait {seconds} seconds before requesting a new code.

profile.photoDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this photo?
profile.photoDeleteDescription: This action is permanent. Please confirm to continue.
